column1: # MHONGOOSE/KAT-7: NGC7424 rotation curve from Sorgho+2019 (MNRAS 482, 1248)
# 3D BAROLO fit to KAT-7 HI data cube
# Distance: 9.55 Mpc (Meurer+2006), Inclination: 29.0 deg (3D BAROLO avg)
# M_HI: 1.26e10 Msun (log=10.1), M_star: 2.51e9 Msun (log=9.4, WISE W1-W2)
# ISO halo (M/L fixed=0.25): rho_0 = 107.9e-3 Msun/pc^3, r_c = 1.9 kpc, chi2_red = 1.8
# NFW (M/L fixed=0.25): r200 = 92.7 kpc, c = 6.5, chi2_red = 4.8
# Digitized from Figure 9 (left panel, 3D BAROLO points) and Figure 15 (ISO model top panel)
# Note: ring width ~4 kpc (2 rings per beamwidth)
